text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I win again! Still undefeated! ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augggh, damn it! Why can't I win?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Teio and I are skippin' rocks, but I keep on losing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
At first it was just 'cause we were bored, but after
a while, things got serious.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know anything about skipping rocks, but
now that I've given it a try, it's a lot of fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You just give them a little toss and they go zooooom! Feels great when you get it just right!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How did you get so much better than me?! We
were on the same level when we started!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Probably because I'm the Invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I don't want to admit it, but that was a super
cool line...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What can I do to beat Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What can I do to beat Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The perfect rock? You mean the biggest one I can
find, right?
choice_data_list: You have to find one you can work with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I teach Vodka all about what to look for in a
rock, including the best shape and weight for
skipping.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh, so that's how ya do it... I was just using
jagged ones before 'cause they looked cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll go look for a good one!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Look as hard as you like. It's not like you're
gonna beat me anyway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, ever earnest, follows my advice and looks
carefully for a perfectly shaped rock. And so...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Your time has come! Go forth and fly... Great
Golem Juniooor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! It flew all the way to the other side of
the river!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! Hell yeah! I got my first win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you beat my perfect record... I
won't let you get away with this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's go again, Vodka! This time, I'll prove that
you just got lucky!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You're on! No way my Great Golem the Third is
gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up watching them skip rocks until the sun
goes down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ohh, I gotcha! Just like with throwin' a ball, right?
choice_data_list:
But making it spin isn't the only thing to keep in
mind...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, now let's give this a shot! Check this
out, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She's definitely gotten the wrong idea here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I bet she'll spin her whole body instead of just the
rock!
choice_data_list: I can definitely see that happening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And as we predicted...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight! Time for the Vodka Screw Maaax!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Wait! Whoa! My legs can't keep u—aaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splaaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Called it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Vodka! It's no fun if you're so predictable!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sh-shut up and help me already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we get Vodka out of the water, I teach her
how to use her wrist to put spin on her rock.
